headlines.headline: Jorvix Diagnostics signs multi-year partnership with a top-tier research institute

sentiment.reasoning: A multi-year partnership with a top-tier research institute suggests potential for innovation, new product development, and sustained revenue streams.

headlines.headline: Jorvix Diagnostics files routine patent applications in data analytics

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
